content:
The user is asking me to "fork it" on GitHub. This is a common action on GitHub - to create a fork of a repository. 

Looking at the current page context, I'm on https://github.com/esokullu/webbrain - this is a GitHub repository page.

To fork a repository on GitHub, I need to:
1. Navigate to the repository page (which I'm already on)
2. Click the "Fork" button (usually in the top right area of the repository page)

Let me first read the current page to understand what I'm looking at and find the fork button.[
    {"tool_call_id": "0", "tool_name": "get_accessibility_tree", "parameters": {"filter": "visible"}}
]
